title: Civil Aviation Affairs Drone Regulatory Framework and Permit Process
summary: Requires drone operators to obtain Civil Aviation Affairs approval, submit applications at least seven working days before operation, provide operator details, insurance, operation scope, and no-objection letters from relevant authorities.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Sets the public permit process for drone operations in Bahrain.

notes: Related instruments: Civil Aviation Law No. 14 of 2013 and Law No. 4 of 2022
